V-M-073.scope: Phase-56 premium public site and auth verification for landing, login, registration, verification, password recovery, tariff preview, logo visibility, Matrix runtime safety, and email-proof semantics.

module-checks.check-7: Chrome screenshot audit for /, /login, /register, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, 1440x900, plus reduced-motion 390x844.
module-checks.check-11: git diff --name-only HEAD -- install.sh docker-compose.yml nginx deploy deploy/mtproto-de-compose.yml .env.example must be empty

verification-matrix.target-1: Public entry route exists in App routing, uses premium Matrix tokens, exposes visible KrotPN identity/logo, and gives direct registration CTA without replacing the usable first screen with a bulky marketing hero.
verification-matrix.target-2: Public copy truthfully presents VPN, free individual MTProto proxy, verified-email registration, and paid tariff preview without implying VPN/trial/JWT/MTProto/referral access before email proof.
verification-matrix.target-3: Login/register/forgot/reset/verify routes preserve existing auth API calls, token storage boundaries, duplicate-email recovery CTA, spam-folder guidance, password example, and reset/verify token query handling.
verification-matrix.target-4: Tariff preview reads or mirrors only existing canonical M-068 shape and never owns prices, device limits, checkout amount, or frontend-controlled payment metadata.
verification-matrix.target-5: Phone, tablet, desktop, and reduced-motion screenshots prove no text/icon overlap, no horizontal scroll, no hidden primary CTA, and readable forms over Matrix effects.
verification-matrix.target-6: MatrixBackground/VisualShell remain pointer-safe, reduced-motion-aware, and do not intercept auth form input, route navigation, or mobile scroll.
verification-matrix.target-7: Brand assets from M-069 remain public static assets only; no tokenized URL, secret-bearing logo path, or mailbox-provider BIMI assumption is introduced.

success-scenarios.scenario-1: Public route communicates KrotPN offer, VPN value, free MTProto proxy value, canonical tariffs, and registration CTA in a premium compact Matrix layout.
success-scenarios.scenario-2: Auth routes stay compact, readable, logo-aware, and usable on phone/tablet/desktop and in reduced-motion mode.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Registration still creates pending email verification state only; access side effects remain delayed until verified email proof.
success-scenarios.scenario-4: Duplicate-email recovery, spam-folder guidance, password strength/example, reset, and verify-email states remain visible and token-safe.
success-scenarios.scenario-5: Tariff preview preserves KrotPN 1/6/9, 369/693/936 RUB, 30 days, and plan_id-only checkout ownership by backend catalog.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Public/auth effects obscure forms, delay registration, intercept clicks, or hide verification/reset states.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Copy promises immediate VPN/trial/MTProto/referral/JWT access before verified-email activation.
failure-scenarios.failure-3: Canonical tariff data, prices, duration, device limits, or YooKassa metadata become frontend-authoritative.
failure-scenarios.failure-4: Public landing creates a bulky generic marketing page, oversized cards, nested cards, decorative orbs, or a one-note palette that violates M-072.
failure-scenarios.failure-5: Real emails, tokens, reset/verify secrets, API keys, MTProto secrets, or payment IDs are logged by smoke tests or console markers.

telemetry-requirements.requirement-1: Smoke output may print route names, viewport names, selector markers, and screenshot paths only.
telemetry-requirements.requirement-2: Smoke output must not print real emails, access/refresh tokens, reset/verify tokens, API keys, proxy secrets, VPN configs, payment IDs, or Resend/YooKassa secrets.
telemetry-requirements.requirement-3: Console markers added to auth/public routes must be deterministic and non-sensitive; values from inputs and URL token query parameters must never be logged.

phase-gates.gate-1: M-073 route/static smoke validates public/auth routes, state labels, CTA, logo visibility, email-proof guard, and tariff canonicality.
phase-gates.gate-2: M-009, M-068, M-069, M-070, M-071, and M-072 regression smokes remain satisfied after public/auth edits.
phase-gates.gate-3: Frontend build, screenshot matrix, Phase-44/46/50/55 regression smokes, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff check, and protected deploy/install guard pass before Phase-56 can be marked done-local.

execution-evidence.command-9: Chrome headless screenshots with virtual-time-budget for /, /login, /register, /forgot-password, /reset-password, /verify-email at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 768x1024, 1440x900, plus reduced-motion 390x844.
execution-evidence.command-10: python3 XML parse for Phase-56/M-073/V-M-073/index docs; mygrace lint; git diff --check; protected deploy/install guard.
execution-evidence.result: PASS: required markers emitted, public/auth screenshot dimensions validated, representative frames visually reviewed, verified-email copy preserved, canonical tariff preview matched M-068 markers, and protected deploy/install/runtime surfaces remained unchanged.

V-M-073.autonomous-execution-safety: Safe for local autonomous execution if changes stay inside frontend public/auth routes, frontend CSS/components needed for M-073, and smoke verification. Stop execution if backend registration semantics, billing catalog ownership, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, VPN, MTProto, or secret handling must change.
